patterns.description: Pre-auth landing page presents 3 role cards (Teacher / Student / Parent), each a primary CTA routing to the role-specific auth flow. Post-auth: redirect to role dashboard.
patterns.tradeoff: Extra 1 click for returning teachers, mitigated by session-aware auto-redirect

patterns.description: External API requires both PAT (for teacher-bound capabilities) and student_session cookie (for scoping). Mismatch of classroomId between two → 403.
patterns.tradeoff: Requires Canva app to send credentials=include; already done (CORS memory entry confirms)

patterns.description: Sandboxed app contexts must request host platform to open external URLs via SDK, not window.open. Host provides consent UX.
patterns.tradeoff: Adds dependency on host SDK; user may abort (status=aborted) — requires graceful handling

patterns.description: Group low-frequency but critical links (token settings, Canva app install) in a single header cluster rather than scattering across routes.
patterns.tradeoff: Could become kitchen sink; limit to 3-4 items

patterns.description: All UI chrome colors must use CSS var(--color-*) / var(--radius-*) / var(--shadow-*). User-data-driven colors (e.g. card.color) are allowed but must come from a validated palette.
patterns.tradeoff: Fallback values (var(--x, #hex)) reduce reliance on token system — should remove once tokens verified loaded
